fullArticle:
Apple TV has published the first trailer of Snoopy’s next adventure, where he finds his doghouse after it is accidentally sold at a yard sale. Watch it below.

Apple TV shared today the trailer for ‘Snoopy Presents: There’s No Place Like Home, Snoopy,’ which is set to premiere on July 31.

The new special is part of Apple’s long-running partnership with Peanuts, which has made Apple TV the exclusive streaming home for several Peanuts original series and specials, as well as the entire classic Peanuts library. Apple’s partnership with Peanuts has also expanded beyond streaming, bringing Snoopy to the Apple Watch through a dedicated watch face and to Apple TV through animated screen savers.

Here’s what to expect from ‘Snoopy Presents: There’s No Place Like Home, Snoopy,’ according to Apple ...
